topic: Tulfo defamation charges against whistleblowers as SLAPP tactic
tweet1: Sen. Erwin Tulfo filed grave oral defamation charges against former congressman Mike Defensor and three others who linked him to DPWH corruption—classic shoot-the-messenger.
tweet2: @ABSCBNNews reports Tulfo's filing targets the accusers, not the actual flood control scandal. Palace Press Officer Castro just confirmed former DPWH Secretary Bonoan's corruption link to Romualdez. So why sue the whistleblowers?
tweet3: Ombudsman findings on Bonoan already public. Defensor and the others flagged suspicious projects. Instead of addressing the evidence, Tulfo's going after their speech. That's SLAPP—legal harassment to silence scrutiny.
tweet4: If Tulfo's clean, he'd welcome investigation. Filing defamation charges means dragging witnesses through court instead of clearing his name through transparency. Expect more cases if this one sticks.
